title: Armadillo Scute Armor
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR/BH_ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR_Header.webp) Get ready to craft a new armor! Armor of Armadillo Scutes. This armor will be a little tougher than leather armor, but also a little worse than iron armor. Of course, you will be able to craft it in exactly the same way as the other armors, but now using armadillo scutes. Of course, trims and enchantments can be added! Make armadillos even more useful! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR/BH_ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR_Summary.webp) We thought that armadillo scales could have much more use, that's why we created this fantastic mod that allows you to use the scales to create a new armor. This armor is a bit better than the leather armor, but at the same time, it is also a bit worse than the iron armor, so it would be very useful at the beginning of the game! Of course, you can also add trims and enchantments to it. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR/BH_ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR/BH_ARMADILLO_SCUTE_ARMOR_Screenshots.webp) ![Armadillo Scute Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ROQUKdm5/images/4d94d9c969bcecde66d723aa680e49d753a100d9.jpeg) ![Armadillo Scute Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ROQUKdm5/images/5ff0e8c88c3a60ee508406ac4eaad0148357a3c5.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
